I can't replicate this on my FreeBSD-8 i386
Just recently I rebuild all my desktop on FreeBSD-8 amd64 in 32bit jail
lyx compiled fine... and it works fine as well on my desktop

When I ported lyx 1.6 i compilled it on my i386 desktop PC, again it
was fine...
Maybe this is FreeBSD-7 specific problem

http://www.freebsd.org/doc/en_US.ISO8859-1/books/porters-handbook/dads-pthread.html
